response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match for this role: nearly two decades of full-stack experience with deep, recent TypeScript/Node.js/React work in product settings, hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience (a rare and explicitly required skill), and a demonstrated testing-first craftsmanship culture (TDD, test frameworks, CI/CD, trunk-based development). He has cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB/MySQL, and a CS degree from ETH Zürich. Gaps are minor and learnable: Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are not explicitly evidenced, and a notable share of his portfolio is in the niche DLang ecosystem rather than the target stack.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple product companies, well beyond the 6-year bar
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development, directly matching the AI agent requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, plus cloud (AWS), Docker, and Kubernetes experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience, though adjacent framework and testing depth suggests fast ramp-up
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skill list; Java exposure appears dated
Significant investment in the niche DLang ecosystem; interview should confirm current-stack depth over breadth

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
